return [
  {
    label: 'Responses',
    data: variables['63dad73f-371b-416f-9ade-12c27d3ce31e'].map(item => item.responses),
    borderColor: '#3b82f6',
    backgroundColor: 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1)',
    tension: 0.4,
    fill: true
  },
  {
    label: 'Opt-Outs',
    data: variables['63dad73f-371b-416f-9ade-12c27d3ce31e'].map(item => item.optOuts),
    borderColor: '#ef4444',
    backgroundColor: 'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.1)',
    tension: 0.4,
    fill: true
  },
  {
    label: 'Interested',
    data: variables['63dad73f-371b-416f-9ade-12c27d3ce31e'].map(item => item.interested),
    borderColor: '#22c55e',
    backgroundColor: 'rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.1)',
    tension: 0.4,
    fill: true
  }
]
